name: Curried Peanut Soup
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Chicken stock or Canned broth
1/2 cup Creamy peanut butter (do not use old-fashioned style or freshly Ground)
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chopped green onions and fresh cilantro.
2. Heat oil in a heavy large saucepan over medium-high heat.
3. Add onion, garlic, and curry powder; sauté until the onion is translucent, about 6 minutes.
4. Add 4 cups of stock and bring to a boil.
5. Stir in rice and carrots. Reduce heat and simmer until rice is very tender, stirring occasionally, about 20 minutes.
6. Puree half of the soup in a blender or food processor with peanut butter.
7. Return puree to the saucepan.
- (Can be prepared up to 1 day ahead. Cover and refrigerate.)
8. Stir soup until heated through; thinning with more stock, if desired.
9. Do not boil.
10. Mix in sugar.
11. Ladle soup into bowls.
12. Sprinkle with green onions and cilantro.
Makes 4 servings.
